title: Allen Coral Atlas — Benthic, Geomorphic, and Reef Extent Maps (Red Sea & Gulf of Aden)
abstract: High-resolution (bathymetry-corrected satellite imagery) benthic habitat, geomorphic zonation, and reef extent maps for the Red Sea and Gulf of Aden region, produced by the Allen Coral Atlas program. Includes vector layers (benthic cover class, geomorphic class, reef extent boundary) plus a summary statistics table of cover fractions and area by class.

variables.name: class
variables.label: Benthic Class
variables.description: Benthic cover class per mapped polygon (e.g. coral/algae, rock, rubble, sand, seagrass) per the Allen Coral Atlas classification scheme.

variables.name: class
variables.label: Geomorphic Class
variables.description: Reef geomorphic zone per mapped polygon (e.g. reef crest, reef flat, back reef slope, lagoon).

variables.name: class_type
variables.label: Class Type
variables.description: Whether the row describes a benthic or geomorphic class.

variables.name: cover_fraction
variables.label: Cover Fraction
variables.description: Fraction of total mapped area occupied by this class.

variables.name: cover_sqkm
variables.label: Cover Area
variables.description: Total mapped area for this class.

steward.name: Allen Coral Atlas program (mirrored internally by KAUST)

access.how_to_request: Publicly downloadable from https://allencoralatlas.org/ under the Allen Coral Atlas data license (see 1-Data-Licenses-and-Citation-Guidance.pdf in the source folder).

provenance.originator: Allen Coral Atlas (Arizona State University, Coral Reef Alliance, Vulcan Inc., Planet)
provenance.license: Allen Coral Atlas data license — attribution required, see included citation guidance PDF
provenance.citation: Allen Coral Atlas. (2023). Imagery, maps and monitoring of the world's tropical coral reefs.
